goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: Repaired nested Pantry summary parsing and mounted-state shortage generation, with focused regressions and exact browser readiness checks. Scoped formatting/lint, focused tests, types, isolated webpack build, full rendered Pantry workflow, axe, five screenshots, disposable migrations/database check, port cleanup, and diff integrity pass.
deviations: Used a zero-delay mount-effect timer with cleanup because scoped ESLint rejects synchronous setState inside effects.
Used fixed-path cleanup only for authorized mirror-generated outputs after shell policy rejected native recursive removal.
Used a manually owned webpack dev server because the repository Playwright webServer defaults to Turbopack.
An initial fresh browser attempt missed the mapping-saved status; the permitted second fresh-state run passed the complete workflow without retries.
